ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the scenario */,
  "attribute" TEXT /* Specific attribute being analyzed */,
  "process" TEXT /* Process related to the energy commodity */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the energy commodity */,
  "lim_type" TEXT /* Limiting type for the data entry */,
  "time_slice" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., ANNUAL) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the currency */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the unit of measurement */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the geographical region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the data source */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the energy metric being analyzed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created or updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy commodity (e.g., solar, wind) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Unit type commonly used for the commodity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the commodity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created or updated the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Three-letter currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the currency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the currency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created or updated the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currencies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created or updated the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., kWh, MWh) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created or updated the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created or updated the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created or updated the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
